description: A retailer has stopped doing business with the wholesaler. An agent needs to deactivate their account.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer account to be deactivated.
Verify that there are no outstanding orders or invoices on the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the account has a zero balance.

nodes.task_description: Deactivate the customer account in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully marks the account as inactive.
